subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, Who art the Lord of all things visible and invisible,and the Supreme Protector of all creation! I entreat Thee by Thy name
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا اله الغیب و الشهود و المهیمن علی الوجود اسئلک باسمک الودود بان
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for unity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
